pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and Commissioning of the complete Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Two (2) Water Cooled Chillers, each with a capacity of 300 TR, are required.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressors must be of the Screw Compressor type.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chillers must use R-134a refrigerant, and the first charge of refrigerant and oil must be included.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller evaporator and condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 tubes.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: One (1) Induced Draft Cooling Tower is required, with a circulation flow rate sufficient for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be constructed with an FRP Basin, Casing, and Louvers, and use PVC for the Fill and Eliminator.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29°C and achieve a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33°C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower fan must be an Axial Fan equipped with a VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: A chemical dosing system for the Cooling Tower must be supplied.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: One (1) Double Skin Air Handling Unit (AHU) with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM is required.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The AHU must deliver outlet air at a temperature of 22°C +/- 2°C.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The AHU must deliver outlet air with a relative humidity of 45% +/- 2%.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must include a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU fan must be a Plug fan type equipped with a VFD.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, casing, tubes, and header must be made of SS 304, with plain aluminum fins.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU drain pan must be made of SS-304.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Three (3) Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) suitable for a 600 TR load are required.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Three (3) Condenser Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) suitable for a 600 TR load are required.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pump motors must be IE-3 rated, TEFC, with class F insulation.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump construction materials: Cast Iron Casing, SS Impeller, and EN8 Shaft.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply and install chilled water and cooling water piping. The vendor is responsible for providing the piping specification as a deliverable.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide detailed engineering documents including P&ID, HAZOP, GA drawings, and specifications for all equipment, piping, electrical, and instruments.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The electrical power supply available at the site is 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Ph.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply MCC panel, AHU starter panel, PLC panel, and VFD panels.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The PLC system must be from an approved make: Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Water Cooled Screw Chiller must be from an approved make: Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Cooling Tower must be from an approved make: Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Air Handling Unit (AHU) must be from an approved make: Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps must be from an approved make: KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply instruments including pressure gauges, temperature gauges, water flow switches, electromagnetic flow meter, temperature transmitter, and a velocity sensor for the AHU outlet.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must perform pre-commissioning, commissioning, start-up, and Guaranteed Technical Run (GTR).
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide a separate cost for one year of operation and maintenance service.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply commissioning spares and a list of spares for 2 years of maintenance.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The client (MAL) is responsible for providing power and water for installation at one designated point.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The client (MAL) is responsible for obtaining all required permits for the job.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Any dismantling, site breaking, or reconstruction work is excluded from the vendor's scope and is the client's (MAL) responsibility.
references: Source: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
